info.description:
Postman collection for iPAC MVC JSON endpoints.

Setup:
1. Set baseUrl (default http://localhost:14314/)
2. Authenticate with Windows Auth (use Postman Interceptor or import cookies from browser after opening iPAC)
3. Most Angular APIs use POST with JSON body matching action parameter names

Admin area routes use prefix Admin/

Regenerate: .\scripts\Generate-PostmanCollection.ps1
info.name: Bupa iPAC API
